arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen XI vs Bayern Munich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen take on Bayern Munich tonight in a mouthwatering all-German Champions League clash. The Bundesliga rivals meet in European competition for the first time this evening. Leverkusen dethroned Bayern Munich as German champions last season, completing a historic unbeaten campaign on route to an invincible double. arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen square up in the Champions League’s Round of 16 this evening. The German giants collide in Europe for the first time at the Allianz Arena. Having battled for Bundesliga supremacy over the last two seasons, their continental clash is the latest chapter in a fascinating rivalry. arts.ttl: “We don’t have a cash cow that brings in ducats every day” — Bayern Munich president portends a quiet summer
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s contract business may be mostly restricted to existing extensions this summer — as a bevy of high-profile negotiations for the likes of Alphonso Davies, Jamal Musiala, and Joshua Kimmich dominate both the presses and the front office’s internal efforts. Due to the high costs of the new contracts (Davies, Musiala, Kimmich), Bayern are not planning major signings for the coming summer.

arts.ttl: Eberl opens up on expiring contracts of Kimmich, Sané and Muller
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Max Eberl has once again addressed the expiring contracts of Joshua Kimmich, Leroy Sané and Thomas Müller.

arts.ttl: Report reveals Stuttgart star's release clause amid Bayern links
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart midfielder Angelo Stiller, recently linked with Bayern Munich, has a release clause in his contract, according to Sport Bild.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso keen to maintain unbeaten run against Bayern
arts.sum: Ahead of Bayer Leverkusen's Champions League cracker against Bayern Munich, Xabi Alonso was asked about the fact that he hasn't lost to the Bavarians since joining Die Werkself.

arts.sum: What about some takes on the recent transfer news involving Bayern Munich being a “realistic” possibility for Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz to to join the Bavarians next season? Bayern Munich ’s plans to secure the future of its central defense look well underway.
